mapper.select: SELECT * FROM eval_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eval_record (task_id, course_id, student_id, total_score, comment_content, submit_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{courseId}, #{studentId}, #{totalScore}, #{commentContent}, #{submitTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT er.id, er.task_id AS taskId, er.course_id AS courseId, mc.course_name AS courseName, er.student_id AS studentId, su.real_name AS studentName, er.total_score AS totalScore, er.comment_content AS commentContent, er.submit_time AS submitTime FROM eval_record er LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = er.student_id LEFT JOIN math_course mc ON mc.id = er.course_id WHERE er.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY er.submit_time DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(submit_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS value FROM eval_record GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(submit_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT mc.course_name AS name, ROUND(AVG(er.total_score), 2) AS value FROM eval_record er LEFT JOIN math_course mc ON mc.id = er.course_id GROUP BY er.course_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5
